watches.label: Beijing to Bangkok sentinel round trip

source_notes.google_fast_flights: Verified in this workspace. Uses Google Flights data through fast-flights, no API key.
source_notes.ctrip_tripcom: Probed but not enabled. Ctrip/Trip.com returned WhaleGuard block in headless and CDP-driven Chrome.
source_notes.kayak_momondo: Probed but not enabled. Static page loads; result polling API needs front-end metadata and browser runs redirect to bot page.
source_notes.paid_api_ready: The monitor can be extended to SerpApi/SearchApi/Travelpayouts/Amadeus if an API key is supplied.
